com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXNode

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConnectivityObject, IXModuledObject, IXObject, IXWriteableObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXReferenceNode, IXStructureNode

    public interface IXNode
extends IXModuledObject
    Interface for accessing the bundles, bundle regions, connector and splice related to a node.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXAdditionalComponent> getAdditionalComponents()
      Get the additional components associated with the node.
      java.util.Set<IXBreakoutTape> getBreakoutTapes()
      Get the breakout tapes associated with this node.
      java.util.Set<IXBundleRegion> getBundleRegions()
      Get the bundle regions terminated at this node.
      java.util.Set<IXBundle> getBundles()
      Get the bundles associated this node.
      IXConnector getConnector()
      Get the connector situated at this node.
      IXDevice getDevice()
      Get the device situated at this node.
      IXHarness getHarness()
      Get the harness to which the node belongs.
      IXHole getHole()
      Get the hole situated at this node.
      java.util.Set<IXInsulationRun> getInsulationRuns()
      Get the insulation runs associated with this node.
      java.util.Set<IXObject> getNodeComponents()
      Get the node components associated with the node.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXRingTerminal> getRingTerminals()
      Get the ring terminals placed at this node.
      IXSplice getSplice()
      Get the splice situated at this node.
      java.util.Set<IXSpotTape> getSpotTapes()
      Get the spot tapes associated with this node.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXModuledObject

        getFunctionalModuleCodes, getGeneratedFunctionalModuleCodes, getGeneratedFunctionalModuleCodesExpression, getGeneratedProductionModuleCodes, getGeneratedProductionModuleCodesExpression, getModuleCodeSetter, getProductionModuleCodes, getUserFunctionalModuleCodes, getUserFunctionalModuleCodesExpression, getUserProductionModuleCodes, getUserProductionModuleCodesExpression

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXWriteableObject

        getAttributeSetter

        getAssembly, getDesign, getInstances, getInstances

    • Method Detail

      • getBundles

        java.util.Set<IXBundle> getBundles()
        Get the bundles associated this node.
        Returns:
        a Set of bundles associated with this node if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getBundleRegions

        java.util.Set<IXBundleRegion> getBundleRegions()
        Get the bundle regions terminated at this node.
        Returns:
        a Set of bundle regions terminated at this node if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getConnector

        IXConnector getConnector()
        Get the connector situated at this node.
        Returns:
        the connector situated at this node if one exists, null otherwise.

      • getRingTerminals

        java.util.Set<? extends IXRingTerminal> getRingTerminals()
        Get the ring terminals placed at this node. In 2011.1, only one ring terminal is allowed to be placed on the node. We are returning a set of ring terminals here considering that in the future we would be allowing multiple ring terminals to be placed at one node.
        Returns:
        the ring terminals placed at this node if any exists, an empty set otherwise.

      • getSplice

        IXSplice getSplice()
        Get the splice situated at this node.
        Returns:
        the splice situated at this node if one exists, null otherwise.

      • getDevice

        IXDevice getDevice()
        Get the device situated at this node.
        Returns:
        the device situated at this node if one exists, null otherwise.

      • getHole

        IXHole getHole()
        Get the hole situated at this node. A node can have at most one Hole (or one Connector) associated with it.
        Returns:
        the hole situated at this node if one exists, null otherwise.

      • getNodeComponents

        java.util.Set<IXObject> getNodeComponents()
        Get the node components associated with the node.
        Returns:
        Set<IXObject@gt; Set of node components associated with the node.

      • getAdditionalComponents

        java.util.Set<IXAdditionalComponent> getAdditionalComponents()
        Get the additional components associated with the node.
        Returns:
        Set<IXAdditionalComponent@gt; Set of all additional components associated with the node.

      • getHarness

        IXHarness getHarness()
        Get the harness to which the node belongs.
        Returns:
        IXHarness Harness to which the node belongs.

      • getBreakoutTapes

        java.util.Set<IXBreakoutTape> getBreakoutTapes()
        Get the breakout tapes associated with this node.
        Returns:
        a Set of breakout tapes associated with this node if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getSpotTapes

        java.util.Set<IXSpotTape> getSpotTapes()
        Get the spot tapes associated with this node.
        Returns:
        a Set of spot tapes associated with this node if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getInsulationRuns

        java.util.Set<IXInsulationRun> getInsulationRuns()
        Get the insulation runs associated with this node.
        Returns:
        a Set of insulation runs associated with this node if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.
